reviews.comment:
Faltan mas plateros estuvimos 1 hora para que nos vengan combustible ⛽

(Translated by Google)
We need more gas station attendants; we waited an hour for fuel ⛽

reviewReply.comment: Lamentablemente no podemos agregar mas personal. Si podes utilizar horarios en los que no se junta tanta gente

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xRd1pWbENlRFpvWjNsdVRtMVlTalpZZUZsblZuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Buen combustible siempre hay cola o casi siempre ya q solo hay dos estaciones en chos malal, los baños siempre están limpios los chicos q trabajan siempre amables y el full vende de todo podés comer a buenos precios un buen menú completo

(Translated by Google)
Good fuel, there's always a line, or almost always, since there are only two stations in Chos Malal. The bathrooms are always clean, the staff are always friendly, and the station sells everything; you can eat a good, complete meal at good prices.

(Translated by Google)
Very good.

reviews.comment:
Servicio muy lento, tanto en la carga de combustible como en el de comidas del full

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service, both in refueling and in the full meal service.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Gisela. La carga de combustible a veces hay un poco de demora, pero el Full es impecable

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKQmVEQldVall0V0ZkSFpIRTNiVXBVVkVaNVluYxAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen muy pocas ganas de trabajar, siempre cola pero porque son lentísimos y le ponen muy pocas ganas..

(Translated by Google)
They have very little desire to work, they're always in line because they're incredibly slow and put very little effort into it.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Fabiana. Lamemto decirte que nuestros chicos le ponen lo mejor, lamentablemente estamos colapsados, vendemos mucho mas que el promedio que los operarios pueden vender por turno. Te sugiero que concurras en horarios en que hay menos gente

reviews.comment:
Que onda el ACa? Un solo playero para atender la tremenda demanda de los primeros días de cobro? lo grande que esta la cuidados y el tiempo que uno se tiene que tomar para esperar? Agregando además de que venimos del interior por tramites y turnos y que tenemos que esperar un montón xq solo hay un palmero trabajando!

(Translated by Google)
What's up with the ACA? Just one attendant to handle the huge demand during the first few days of payday? How big is the service station and how long do we have to wait? And on top of that, we came from the countryside for appointments and paperwork, and we have to wait ages because there's only one attendant working!

reviewReply.comment: Hola Fabiana. El único horario donde hay un solo playero es despuŵs de las 00

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oSWNqWnlSMjh5VlZoQ1EyYzVZbkZIVGtsQldXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Siendo tres playeros demoran el doble o mas que en el resto de estaciones del pais, inneficiencia total

(Translated by Google)
With only three attendants, it takes twice as long or more than at other stations in the country; total inefficiency.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Alexis!!! Superan ampliamente el promedionde ventas por playero

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wTmNGTm5lV3BxWDNSdU5VSlhkblZMVEVFNWMyYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lo único bueno , la excelente atención de los chicos de la playa- pero luego se hace cola de 2 cuadras para cargar , los de la parte de la comida charlan con los vecinos y tarden mil años en hacerte unas papas fritas . Y agradece que puedas llegar a tener combustible porque siempre falta alguno .

(Translated by Google)
The only good thing is the excellent service from the guys at the beach—but then you have to wait in line for two blocks to fill up, the food staff chat with the neighbors, and it takes forever to make you some fries. And be grateful you even get fuel because they're always out.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Anto. Una lastima que nonte hallamos atendido como te mereces

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21NdFYyTTJibFZNT1RCUFpscFNSRVZSV1dsaVZrRRAB
